title.en: Soon after, the holy war was completely over.

content.en:
Soon after, the holy war was completely over.

Ye Tian, the first saint son of ten thousand laws on the holy war list, the second light-clothed saint girl, and the third place is not the Zilin Holy Son, nor the Flying Holy Son, but the True Eye Holy Son from the Holy Gate of the Underworld, the other party is not only a holy endower, but also has mastered the three consummation domain techniques, relying on a slight advantage to defeat several other holy endowers one by one, thus winning the third place.

The fourth place of the Zilin Holy Son, the fifth place of the Feiyang Holy Son, the sixth place of the Baili Holy Son, the seventh place of the Yuanfeng Holy Son, and the eighth place of the Yongyuan Holy Son.

As for the Star Light Holy Son of the Battle Gate, he ranked eighteenth, the Yang Xi Holy Son ranked nineteenth, and the Star Feather Holy Son ranked 28th.

If it weren't for Ye Tian, there would not be a single one in the top ten in the battle gate this time, or even one in the top fifteen.

But now with Ye Tian, the battle gate's record is brilliant.

The top 30 occupy four people, and Ye Tian is the first, such a record can be called the first.

The Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor was very happy, Ye Tian won the first place, and for the Battle Gate, there were too many benefits.

Comparatively speaking, the investment of the battle gate is simply not worth mentioning.

This time, Zhanmen has made a lot of money!

As the first place in the holy war, there are naturally rewards, in fact, the top 100 in the holy war have rewards, but the most generous rewards are the top ten, and the rewards in the back are average.

And Ye Tian also won the first prize-

A holy skill, a holy body inheritance and its corresponding treasures, a holy relic and a lot of resources.

And the holy skill reward is not an ordinary reward, this is a holy war jointly organized by the ten holy gates, and this holy skill is naturally a very good holy skill, and even the Supreme Domain Ancestor is very eager for such a holy skill.

As for whether the Holy Technique is useful to the first place, then they don't care.

"It's a space holy technique!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

Space and time are the two most powerful realms, and the space and time skills are undoubtedly above many other powers.

Of course, if it was a holy technique involving space, time, and more forbidden paths, it would definitely be even more powerful, but even in the Dark Sacred Realm, no one would have heard of it.

Because the Holy Technique is so advanced, it is difficult to create a Sacred Technique that only involves one path, let alone multiple paths.

Others may not have the Spatial Saint Endowment, and the Spatial Saint Technique is of little use to them, but for Ye Tian, the Spatial Saint Technique is simply too suitable for him.

Because he has the Spatial Endowment!

The inheritance of the Holy Body obtained is the Starwind Holy Body, ranking 36th on the Dark Sanctuary Holy Body List, which is already a very powerful Holy Body, and there is also a matching Starwind Wood Heart, only the Starwind Wood Heart can help people practice the Starwind Holy Body, otherwise it is easy to fall.

As for those large resources, not to mention, they were much more than the resources that Ye Tian had obtained from the Battle Gate, enough for him to cultivate for a long time, and even enough for him to cultivate the Eternal Immortal Holy Body to the consummation realm.

"Holy Relic!"

Ye Tian stared at that holy artifact, it was a small armor, exuding terrifying power, far above the so-called forbidden treasure.

"This is the holy artifact Jinchen Armor, only the Domain Ancestor can refine it, but if you want to refine it, you can do it, but it can only urge one percent of the power, which is enough to resist the blow of the Supreme Domain Ancestor!"

Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor introduced.

Able to withstand a blow from the Supreme Domain Ancestor?

Ye Tian gasped, this is too powerful, and only one percent of the power can be done to such an extent, if it is to urge all the power, can it withstand the blow of the invincible domain ancestor?

As for whether he could resist the blow of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, he would not have considered this at all, in the eyes of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, ordinary holy relics were just garbage.

For example, this Jin Chenjia is estimated to not even be able to go up the list of holy relics.

The holy war ended, and Ye Tian left the holy war world with his reward.

At this time, the Ancestor of the Blood Gang Domain came to see Ye Tian.

"Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, congratulations on winning the first place in the Holy War Rankings! Next, your reputation will spread throughout the Dark Sacred Domain!"

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor congratulated.

"Blood Gang Domain Ancestor, I'm just a fluke!"

Ye Tian said modestly.

"Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, now that the high-level leaders are in a meeting, even a few Supreme Domain Ancestor level sect masters have come out to discuss the rewards to be given to you, don't leave the Battle Realm Tower for the time being, otherwise you won't be able to contact you!"

Blood Gang Domain Ancestral Dao.

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Half a month passed, and the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor conveyed the content of the meeting.

"According to the decision above, it is announced that you have become the first holy son of the Battle Gate!"

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor hurriedly said.

"Is there any benefit to the First Holy Son?"

Ye Tian only cared about this.

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor smiled and said, "Don't think that the First Holy Son and the other Holy Sons are just more firsts, the First Holy Son is not called for nothing! Before the Supreme Domain Ancestor, the Holy Son cultivated by the Battle Gate could always be called the Holy Son, but once he broke through to the Supreme Domain Ancestor level, he was no longer the Holy Son. And the First Holy Son represents the potential far beyond the other Holy Sons, regardless of the cultivation for the realm, if there is not enough potential, even if it is the top Domain Ancestor realm, the combat power is invincible, and it can easily attack and kill the strongest Domain Ancestor, and it is not qualified to be called the First Holy Son. It's been a long time since we haven't had a First Son, and you are declared the First Son today. The First Holy Son's treatment was many times that of the others, and his status was on par with that of the Supreme Domain Ancestor. Moreover, the First Holy Son can browse the many inheritances and secret techniques of the Battle Gate. In addition, the First Son is eligible to participate in the mid-level meeting. "

"That First Holy Son is indeed good!"

Ye Tian said with satisfaction.

"I will tell you carefully about your treatment later, I promised you before, once you get the first, I will directly reward you with a holy relic. There are a lot of holy relics in the battle gate, I have brought some holy relics names and introductions now, you choose a holy relic!"

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor took out a picture with the name and introduction of a kind of holy artifact on it.

Ye Tian stared at these holy relics carefully, constantly looking for the holy relics that suited him.

"Forbidden Yuan Blade, holy relic, ranked 2892nd on the holy relic list!"

This is the only relict on the list of holy relics above.

At first, Ye Tian was very surprised at how Zhanmen was willing to take out the holy relics on the holy relics list, but he soon found out.

Because the forbidden blade is a holy artifact that is very powerful, but it is also very dangerous, once the forbidden blade is activated, it will wear out the foundation, and even if you fight for a long time, it will be directly destroyed.

Because it frantically absorbs all the energy of the user, even the soul, but the power that erupts is also extremely terrifying, and even ordinary cultivators can fight beyond the level with it in their hands.

For example, Ye Tian could easily kill the top domain ancestor now, but compared to the strongest domain ancestor, it was far inferior.

But if he was holding the Forbidden Yuan Blade, he was afraid that he would be able to fight with the Supreme Domain Ancestor for a while in a short period of time.

"Forbidden Yuan Blade, it's so suitable for me!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.
